causes: Fiscal period not opened in SAP
resolution_steps: Check period status using transaction OB52
Open posting period for company code
Verify user has authorization to post
Confirm fiscal year variant configuration

bapi_errors.message: G/L account 400000 does not exist in company code 1000
causes: G/L account not created in company code
resolution_steps: Verify G/L account exists using FS00
Create G/L account in company code if missing
Update interface mapping with correct account
Check chart of accounts assignment
bapi_errors.prevention: Validate G/L accounts before interface mapping

bapi_errors.message: Cost center ENERGY572 is not valid on 2024-01-15
causes: Cost center not active for posting date
Cost center expired or not created
resolution_steps: Check cost center validity in KS03
Extend validity period if needed using KS02
Verify cost center is assigned to correct company code
Update interface mapping with active cost center
bapi_errors.prevention: Regular review of cost center validity periods

bapi_errors.message: No authorization for transaction FB01 in company code 1000
causes: Company code not in authorization profile
resolution_steps: Check user authorizations using SU53
Add company code to user's authorization profile
Assign role with F_BKPF_BUK authorization
Test authorization using SU53 after changes

bapi_errors.message: Document 1400000000 2024 is locked by user SMITHJ
resolution_steps: Wait for other user to finish editing
Check lock entries using SM12
Contact user to release lock
Delete lock entry if user confirms (SM12)

bapi_errors.message: Document is not balanced: debit 1000.00 credit 900.00
resolution_steps: Verify debit and credit amounts match
Check for rounding errors in source system
Add missing line items to balance document
Review transformation logic

bapi_errors.message: Tax code V0 is not defined for country US
causes: Tax code not configured for country
resolution_steps: Check tax code configuration using FTXP
Configure tax code for country if missing
Update interface mapping with correct tax code
Verify tax calculation procedure
bapi_errors.prevention: Validate tax codes during interface setup

resolution_steps: Check vendor status using XK03
Remove posting block using XK02
Verify reason for block before removing
Contact procurement team if needed

bapi_errors.message: Enter profit center for G/L account 500000
causes: Profit center required but not provided
resolution_steps: Check G/L account master for profit center requirement (FS00)
Add profit center to interface mapping
Verify profit center is active (KE53)
Update transformation logic to include profit center
bapi_errors.prevention: Validate required fields in interface mapping

bapi_errors.message: Number range 01 for document type SA in 2024 is exhausted
resolution_steps: Check number range using FBN1
Extend number range using FBN1
Create new number range interval if needed
Plan for larger intervals in future

bapi_errors.message: Currency USD does not match company code currency EUR
causes: Transaction currency different from local currency
resolution_steps: Verify exchange rate exists for date (OB08)
Maintain exchange rate if missing
Use document currency field for foreign currency
Check company code currency configuration

bapi_errors.message: Payment terms Z030 is not defined
resolution_steps: Check payment terms configuration using OBB8
Create payment terms if missing
Update interface mapping with valid payment terms
Verify payment terms in vendor master

bapi_errors.message: Enter business area for G/L account 600000
resolution_steps: Check G/L account settings (FS00)
Add business area to interface mapping
Verify business area exists and is active
Update transformation to include business area

bapi_errors.message: Enter commitment item for cost center ENERGY572
causes: Commitment item required for cost center
resolution_steps: Check cost center for commitment item requirement (KS03)
Add commitment item to interface mapping
Verify funds management configuration
Consult with finance team on correct commitment item

bapi_errors.message: Assignment field exceeds maximum length of 18 characters
resolution_steps: Review source data format
Implement truncation in transformation logic
Use abbreviations or codes instead of full text
Document field length limitations
bapi_errors.prevention: Validate field lengths in transformation layer
